content: *경이 물품, 고급* --- 이 장갑은 착용하면 투명해집니다. 장갑을 착용하는 동안 민첩([손재주](/1def7f5a1e808148a82bc030e637e4ec?pvs=25)) 판정과 자물쇠 따기에 관련된 민첩 판정에 +5 보너스를 얻습니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/3371406b-c318-4a3a-ac47-874323d91bbe/08-034.goggles-of-night-hammer-of-thunderbolts-hag-eye-gloves-of-thievery.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB466Y7IN45Z5%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T092407Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJIMEYCIQDGOKdBiZShipC9V504a23ZKdoVoYAw9DGTS%2BWddcLfUQIhAOkpkcDfPxsCUjod2Ha4E3bthPSzVepFEz%2BVDqtlECHLKv8DCHAQABoMNjM3NDIzMTgzODA1IgxtOxUg9Hzz%2FBRh2r0q3AMJa2TiwNeOEzYeX%2BOKdyUpWqTUdnJUOGTW%2FHT4BAnGDrWzSJzMpigYb0%2FZjAPDbIxpNfZvX%2BJzeHdtPZAXIrAjX%2FvbSflaXXxURg3mH4x28wn3O8qMC8nhgBQ6KvX1%2BFcwatUnAEFm0wo%2BzSGFrSalWenIxL00YyTDVnlpZPjNrpi6B1t6FTTx9wsOtPovLIfb6aRp5%2BCSTPfoixQhFpUtW1W1MYRaDwGJMXOziGZpOeZP5suh7vogBLprwmZhLOjazouTbKHmJe7NXy6YbfIXfPicDxkpa08zgc6DrlZBCRKDab5GzkmHycmqc97fz2cASpYLOjrCku96GLaPh4z%2F%2BY8TevJS9XOHh3gtdNaqRhRHBji7wrbdwDMAEihs0wO0hbne7UaaB1fCc38unsIeMVSV93Hd1JF9q6Tj4Xt5NFcaFASSVPWeR%2FmDhcAqoo9euF%2FJKNSNngp0ONq2Gkg5g14zLq4nz7D8Aw5CJAdrqHgFq9oEjTT3tSGzKa2qbh%2FwXp%2BPs1jdU0RSBoaPikpFuHwJwzpJc%2F4LKjj9kBqm7%2FOv2qjFg%2B6Arwg%2B5GsyRvgkQpKTQA3pEAkec3bshUwssp5i2mpcH76VlNOqJ%2FuKN%2F3fjaND40WpVs0RVDC%2F3cPRBjqkAcPToFGQ1f7ek%2Bz%2FWJn%2BIzA%2F9mxqkhzkeUUrtETRDc%2FxGHpMn27kzioic5MXgExy40eV8WXfCPdXNFx3CN8WdNICjyf3dQPsRlOGI16e%2FukFz33tMDfvTxJxFVr6n3x7yatx4KSkMMLnoBk%2FzQcUf%2Byi%2B3EP2nGjCdAdQF%2BxE1pk8t4xzioNvylkQBb0xnIPtQzwxMJWkNtTEpUKeEBvQWM%2B4Rnm&X-Amz-Signature=16a64a4e962fd4924f55a6f416e1bb41548e52eaa4752b5f26cbf02aa3813096&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
